headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Quest’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Quest Diagnostics delivered first quarter results that exceeded Wall Street’s revenue and profit expectations, driven by broad-based demand for its clinical innovations and expansion into new areas like end-stage renal disease and brain health. Management attributed the organic growth to increased test volumes across physician, hospital, and consumer channels, alongside productivity gains from automation and artificial intelligence.
